mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, party_id, type, title, content, web_content, status, is_read, scheduled_at, sent_at, read_at, created_at, updated_at FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET status = #{status}, is_read = TRUE, read_at = #{readAt}, updated_at = #{readAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, party_id, type, title, content, web_content, status, is_read, scheduled_at, sent_at, read_at, created_at, updated_at FROM notification WHERE scheduled_at IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_at <= #{now} AND sent_at IS NULL ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT id, user_id, party_id, type, title, content, web_content, status, is_read, scheduled_at, sent_at, read_at, created_at, updated_at FROM notification WHERE scheduled_at IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_at <= #{now} AND sent_at IS NULL ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC LIMIT 100 FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
